title: Long Wood Bench for Dining
summary: A long 2x4 dining bench on splayed legs cut at three different angles, with a center leg and support beam bracing the middle of an 83-1/2" plank-and-2x6 top.
description:
The legs here use three genuinely different angle cuts — the two front legs get a simple 45° cut at the bottom, the four splayed side legs are cut at matching 10° angles with parallel ends, and the two remaining legs are cut at 10° with ends that are NOT parallel — keep these three leg types sorted as you cut, since mixing them up puts the wrong splay on the wrong corner.

**A center support system carries the middle of this long bench** — a long center stretcher, a center leg, and two more legs cut at 30° angles keep an 83-1/2" span from sagging under real dining use. Build the two end leg assemblies first, then the center support, before joining everything with the long stretchers.

The top is two 2x4 boards plus a 2x6 running the full 83-1/2" length, with two short 2x2 cleats cut to fit at the ends — glue and screw the top down once the whole base is square and stable.

materials.name: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

cutList.note: Both ends cut at 10° off square, ends parallel.
Both ends cut at 10° off square, ends not parallel, long point to long point.
Both ends cut at 30° off square, ends parallel.

steps.title: Build the end leg assemblies
steps.body: Cut the front, splayed side, and angled legs, keeping the three types sorted, and assemble the two end leg groups.

steps.title: Build the center support
steps.body: Assemble the center stretcher, center leg, and the two angled center support legs.

steps.title: Join the base
steps.body: Connect the end leg assemblies and center support with the long stretchers.

steps.title: Build and attach the top
steps.body: Cut the top cleats to fit, then glue and screw the 2x4 and 2x6 top boards to the base.

steps.title: Finish
steps.body: Sand all surfaces and apply primer and paint, or stain and poly.
materials: Primer and paint, or stain and poly

unresolvedImages.alt: Long wood dining bench on splayed legs
